mapper.sql: id, session_id, agent_id, user_id, status, total_messages, total_tokens, last_activity_at, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_memory_session (session_id, agent_id, user_id, status, total_messages, total_tokens, metadata) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{agentId}, #{userId}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'active'), COALESCE(#{totalMessages}, 0), COALESCE(#{totalTokens}, 0), CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb))
mapper.update: UPDATE t_memory_session SET total_messages = COALESCE(total_messages, 0) + #{messageDelta}, total_tokens = COALESCE(total_tokens, 0) + #{tokenDelta}, last_activity_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
